title: Agent Context Graph Lockfile
description: Committable plan that pins each task's predicted writes, allowed paths, and DAG position.

version.description: Schema version of this lockfile; bumped on breaking shape changes.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp when the compiler emitted this lockfile.

generator.description: Provenance metadata describing the tool and model that produced the lockfile.

tool.description: Name of the tool that generated the lockfile (e.g. 'acg').

version.description: Semantic version of the generating tool.

model.description: Identifier of the LLM used for predictor reranking, if any.

repo.description: Repository metadata captured at compile time.

root.description: Absolute or repo-relative path to the repository root.

git_url.description: Optional remote URL of the repository for cross-machine reference.

commit.description: Git commit SHA the lockfile was compiled against.

languages.description: Programming languages detected in the repo (e.g. 'typescript', 'python').

items.description: A single language identifier in lowercase.

tasks.description: All compiled tasks with their predicted writes and allowed-path globs.

execution_plan.description: Topologically ordered DAG of parallel and serial groups for the runtime.

groups.description: Ordered execution groups; later groups wait on their declared upstream groups.

conflicts_detected.description: Cross-task overlaps the planner found, plus how each was resolved.

Task.description: A single task as serialized into the lockfile.

id.description: Stable, kebab-case task identifier; unique within a lockfile.

prompt.description: Natural-language description of what the task should accomplish.

predicted_writes.description: Predictor's anticipated file edits, sorted by descending confidence.

allowed_paths.description: Glob patterns the task is permitted to write; enforced by validate_write().

depends_on.description: Upstream task ids that must finish before this task starts.

items.description: Id of an upstream task this task depends on.

parallel_group.description: DAG level this task belongs to; same group ids may run in parallel.

rationale.description: Optional human-facing note explaining the task's scope or risk.

PredictedWrite.description: A predicted file write with confidence and short rationale.

path.description: Repo-relative path the predictor expects the task to modify.

confidence.description: Predictor confidence in the prediction, on [0, 1].

reason.description: Short explanation of why the predictor flagged this path.

Group.description: A node in the execution DAG; runs after all of its waits_for groups.

id.description: Monotonic group identifier, 1-indexed in execution order.

tasks.description: Task ids that belong to this group.

items.description: Id of a task contained in this group.

type.description: Whether tasks in this group run concurrently or one after another.

waits_for.description: Group ids that must complete before this group starts.

items.description: Id of an upstream group this group depends on.

Conflict.description: A detected file overlap between two or more tasks and the chosen resolution.

files.description: Repo-relative file paths shared by the conflicting tasks.

between_tasks.description: Ids of the tasks that overlap on the listed files.

items.description: Id of a task involved in the conflict.

resolution.description: How the planner resolved the conflict (e.g. 'serialize', 'manual').
